summary: Applied a surgical seam polish: rewrote the opening paragraph to avoid repeating Chapter 2's temporal 'By [time]' scaffold while preserving the same move-in information and tone, and added two exit continuity cues that align Chapter 1's final drive beats with Chapter 2's opening car-state details.
edits: Reframed the first paragraph to start from spatial scene pressure instead of a matching 'By [time]' opening construction.
Kept the original opening facts (move-in lane congestion, volunteer traffic callouts, Eli handling printed passes, 9:30 timing, sweat-softened paper) with minimal sentence-level reordering.
Added end-of-chapter car interior continuity detail (stale fries, lemon cleaner, lingering cold brew smell) to hand off into Chapter 2.
Added a brief exit-action beat of the green folder shifting on the passenger seat to bridge into Chapter 2's ongoing folder movement motif.
